title: SAP Certified Associate — SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition Implementation
renewalRules: Complete a SAP Learning Journey renewal exam or earn 20 continuing education credits through SAP Learning Hub within the validity period. Alternatively passing the next version of the exam resets the 2-year clock.
description: Validates ability to configure and implement SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition using the SAP Activate methodology. Covers system landscape, Fiori UX, key financial and logistics processes, and data migration. Recognized by SAP partner and customer organizations as the benchmark credential for S/4HANA functional consultants.

title: SAP Certified Professional — SAP BTP Solution Architect
renewalRules: Renewal requires passing one SAP BTP specialty exam (Integration Suite or Extension Suite) plus 10 hours of SAP Learning Hub content per year. Alternatively re-sit the full exam.
description: Advanced certification for architects designing end-to-end SAP BTP solutions. Covers multi-cloud strategy, integration architecture using SAP Integration Suite, extension patterns on Cloud Foundry and Kyma, and connecting BTP services to SAP and non-SAP backends. Highly valued for pre-sales and solution advisory roles.

title: SAP Certified Associate — SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Core
renewalRules: Complete the SAP SuccessFactors release delta exam (biannual) to stay current with the latest feature set. SAP releases updates twice a year (H1 and H2) and certification holders are expected to demonstrate currency.
description: Entry-level certification for SuccessFactors Employee Central implementation. Validates knowledge of core HR configuration including org structures, business rules, time management, and reporting. A prerequisite for deeper SuccessFactors module certifications (Recruiting, Learning, Compensation).
